$comment: Layer B selection cases for TAXCALC vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The THRU range (state+federal+local withholding) means a single-PERFORM mistranslation withholds only state; every non-zero gross catches it. Includes a half-cent ROUNDED case, a zero, and the PIC 9(7)V99 wrap region.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TAXCALC (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-taxcalc)
